rulings.Case Title: CITYWIDE PROPERTRIES, INC. VS. KRISTEN SKALIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 19, 2015, Line 2. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA CHAPPELL DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, moot. =(REQ/501)

rulings.Case Title: CITYWIDE PROPERTRIES, INC. VS. KRISTEN SKALIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 19, 2015, Line 2. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA CHAPPELL MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED. Opposing party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that an amended complaint adding new causes of action and theories of liability may be filed without leave of court. =(REQ/501)
